lines.en_lit: because sent throughout all the borders of Yisrael and saw that were separating only teruma gedola
first tithe and poor man’s tithe The burden of proof rests upon the claimant. However, second tithe, Let them separate take it up and eat it in Jerusalem,
Ulla said: because these parhedrin, beat entire twelve months and tell them: Sell cheaply, sell cheaply. the Sages did not burden them What parhedrin? appointees [pursei]

Rabba bar bar Ḥana said Rabbi Yoḥanan said: What is which is written: “The fear of the Lord prolongs days, but the years of the wicked will be shortened” The fear of the Lord prolongs days; that First Temple, which stood four hundred and ten years and in only eighteen High Priests served,

But the years of the wicked will be shortened; that Second Temple, which stood four hundred and twenty years and in over three hundred High Priests served. deduct from forty years that Shimon HaTzaddik served, and eighty that Yoḥanan the High Priest served, ten that Yishmael ben Pavi served, and some say eleven that Rabbi Elazar ben Ḥarsum served. go out and calculate from this forward Each and every one did not complete his year

Rabbi Yoḥanan ben Torta said: Due to what was Shiloh destroyed due to that there were two matters in Forbidden sexual relations and degradation consecrated items. forbidden sexual relations, as it is written: “Now Eli was very old and he heard what his sons were doing to all of Israel, how they lay with the women who did service at the opening of the Tent of Meeting” And although Rabbi Shmuel bar Naḥmani said Rabbi Yoḥanan said: Anyone who says that the sons of Eli sinned is nothing other than mistaken, due to
